text.tspan: Daily new hospital admissions for COVID-19 per million, Oct 18, 2020
Data on daily new hospital admissions for COVID-19 is published weekly, and given as the daily average for that
given week. Data is only shown for a select number of European countries.
Source: European Centre for Disease Prevention and Control (ECDC)
Note: Hospitalizations data from this source is currently only available for a select number of countries in Europe.
